name: product_page_3_products_custom-mens-cologne-set

facts.note: A full reviews section is visible lower on the PDP.
The reviews section states "Based on 367 customer reviews."
The sampled top-of-page bundle builder does not show a visible rating summary near the add-to-cart CTA.
This PDP is itself a configurable 4-item bundle builder.
No separate recommendation grid is visible in the sampled screenshot.
The bundle builder presents one-time fragrance selection controls only.
The PDP includes fragrance FAQs, ingredient detail, and Beardbrand Assurance content.
No wallet or express checkout CTA is visible.

observed_strengths.observation: The sampled bundle PDP is a real AOV mechanic, letting shoppers assemble a 4-item fragrance set on one page.
This PDP carries deep educational support through FAQs and a large review base.

missing_or_weak.observation: The top-of-page bundle builder does not surface review proof near the primary CTA, even though strong review volume exists lower on the page.
Naming is inconsistent across metadata and visible content: the page metadata references a custom men's cologne set while the visible H1 says "Custom Father's Day Bundle."

purchase_path_notes: This page is strong for bundle construction, but its review proof is pushed lower and its naming is inconsistent.
